title: effort 四个级别的行为差异
title_en: Behavior Differences Across Four Effort Levels

dimensions.name: thinking 行为
dimensions.a: 可能跳过 thinking（简单问题直接回答）

dimensions.name: tool call
dimensions.a: 倾向于更少的 tool call

dimensions.name: 默认行为
dimensions.b: high 是默认值，等同于不传 effort

dimensions.name: Thinking behavior
dimensions.a: May skip thinking entirely for simple problems

dimensions.name: Tool calls
dimensions.a: Tends to make fewer tool calls
dimensions.b: Calls tools as needed without holding back

dimensions.name: Default behavior
dimensions.b: high is the default (same as omitting effort)
